reasoning: Query asks for off-the-beaten-path samurai districts outside Kyoto. search_area returns 81 matches including Chiran Samurai Residences (Kagoshima, heritage-designated), Aizu Bukeyashiki (Fukushima), Kakunodate (Akita, rich DMO description), Buke Yashiki in Shimane, and Uchiyama Family Residence (Fukui).
